article.content: ### Today i received a mail regarding my **oa schedule at codeSignal by uber** on 15th of june can anyone guide me types and topic of questions i really needed to prepare. Also if i wont able i said if i wont get able to crack it. I am not able to apply for uber anymore within 6 months. please guide me its means alot.  thanks !!!!

post.content: How did it go? How tough were the question mate?
I also have to give the same test.\nIf anyone can help please connect with me.
